name: Starter
description: Best for founders and lean teams that need a polished digital presence quickly.

monthly.caption: Flexible monthly delivery and support for fast launches.

yearly.caption: Annual partnership for continuous iteration at a lower effective rate.

name: Scale
description: For established brands that need custom functionality, integrations, and a dedicated product partner.
features: Up to 15 custom pages or flows

monthly.caption: A senior delivery lane for complex products and enterprise growth initiatives.

yearly.caption: Designed for long-term build velocity across product, content, and experimentation.

name: Growth
description: Ideal for growing businesses that need more pages, stronger funnels, and ongoing optimization.
features: CMS, blog, or landing page system

monthly.caption: Built for teams scaling marketing, content, and lead generation.

yearly.caption: The best balance of delivery speed, flexibility, and retained value.
